title: Apply Prisma 20260419_init migration to staging and production databases
description: No description provided. Derived from context: The 20260419063906_init migration is the single clean baseline migration replacing previous broken duplicate init migrations. It needs to be tracked in git and applied to staging (adjudiclaims-staging on PlanetScale PostgreSQL) and production databases. The migration SQL file exists at prisma/migrations/20260419063906_init/migration.sql. This migration establishes 34 tables with pgvector 0.8.1 support. Staging already has the schema applied (per STATE.md: 'adjudiclaims-staging reset + migrated (33 tables, pgvector 0.8.1)'). This ticket likely covers: (1) ensuring the migration files are properly committed to git (currently untracked as '?? prisma/migrations/20260419063906_init/'), (2) documenting the migration application process, and (3) creating any necessary deployment tooling.
acceptance_criteria: The prisma/migrations/20260419063906_init/ directory and migration.sql are committed to git on main
Staging database (adjudiclaims-staging) has migration applied and tracked by Prisma migrate history
Production database migration apply process is documented or scripted
All existing tests continue to pass after changes
No credentials or connection strings committed to git
